The '''Keeper of History''' was the rank held by the leader of [[Elders (Rakatan)|the Elders]], the [[Rakata/Legends|Rakatans]] who remained civilized and retained the knowledge of the [[Infinite Empire/Legends|Infinite Empire]] rather than resorting to barbarism and [[cannibalism]] like the Tribes of [[The One]]. One of the most known was [[Orsaa]].

{{Stub}}
